headline: How The Ralph Lauren (RL) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets
summary: Ralph Lauren is back in focus after fresh analyst work lifted one fair value estimate to US$413.33 from US$404.76, a modest reset that reflects updated views on the stock. That move lines up with recent Street commentary, where several firms have raised targets and one upgraded the stock after the latest selloff, framing the debate around long term growth and valuation support. As you read on, you will see what is driving this evolving narrative and how to track it over time. Stay updated as...
